'''vazogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacuosity|vacuosity]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-z-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacuosity|vacuosity]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vazogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:væzegeth|væzegeth]] || [[word:væzegej|væzegej]] || [[word:væzegesh|væzegesh]] || [[word:væzege|væzege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vazozogoth|vazozogoth]] || [[word:vazozogoj|vazozogoj]] || [[word:vazozogosh|vazozogosh]] || [[word:vazozogo|vazozogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vazogoth|vazogoth]] || [[word:vazogoj|vazogoj]] || [[word:vazogosh|vazogosh]] || [[word:vazogo|vazogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vazofgoth|vazofgoth]] || [[word:vazofgoj|vazofgoj]] || [[word:vazofgosh|vazofgosh]] || [[word:vazofgof|vazofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vazogotho|vazogotho]] || [[word:vazogojo|vazogojo]] || [[word:vazogosho|vazogosho]] || [[word:vazogoko|vazogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vazogoth|vazogoth]] || [[word:vazogoj|vazogoj]] || [[word:vazogosh|vazogosh]] || [[word:vazogo|vazogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vazogothol|vazogothol]] || [[word:vazogojol|vazogojol]] || [[word:vazogoshol|vazogoshol]] || [[word:vazogokol|vazogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vazogothotho|vazogothotho]] || [[word:vazogojojo|vazogojojo]] || [[word:vazogoshosho|vazogoshosho]] || [[word:vazogoko|vazogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vazogothon|vazogothon]] || [[word:vazogojon|vazogojon]] || [[word:vazogoshon|vazogoshon]] || [[word:vazogokon|vazogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vazogothoro|vazogothoro]] || [[word:vazogojoro|vazogojoro]] || [[word:vazogoshoro|vazogoshoro]] || [[word:vazogokoro|vazogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
